description: Gemini Space Station, Inc. operates a cryptocurrency platform in the United States and internationally. The company offers Gemini, a platform that enables users to trade, custody, and earn in a range of digital assets and offerings; Gemini ActiveTrader for advanced charting, multiple order types, and the ability to monitor and execute in multiple markets; and Gemini Derivatives to trade perpetual contracts with cross-collateralization for risk and capital management. It also provides Gemini Prediction for trading event contracts; custody solutions; and Gemini Credit Card for users to earn cryp
